task_completion.description: Verify that completion tracking is enabled for the 'Introduction to Biology' course.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the course settings page for 'Introduction to Biology' (BIO101), under the 'Completion tracking' section, the 'Enable completion tracking' dropdown should be set to 'Yes'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Required Reading: Cell Biology' Page activity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The course page displays a Page activity named 'Required Reading: Cell Biology', or the activity settings page shows this name along with the page content 'Read about cell structures.'.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Required Reading: Cell Biology' is configured for automatic completion upon viewing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the activity settings for 'Required Reading: Cell Biology', under 'Activity completion', 'Completion tracking' is set to 'Show activity as complete when conditions are met' and the checkbox for 'Student must view this activity to complete it' is checked.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Lab Safety Guidelines' Page activity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The course page displays a Page activity named 'Lab Safety Guidelines', or the activity settings page shows this name along with the page content 'Review safety procedures.'.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Lab Safety Guidelines' is configured for automatic completion upon viewing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the activity settings for 'Lab Safety Guidelines', under 'Activity completion', 'Completion tracking' is set to 'Show activity as complete when conditions are met' and the checkbox for 'Student must view this activity to complete it' is checked.

task_completion.description: Verify that the course completion is set to depend on the completion of both newly created activities.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the 'Course completion' settings page, under 'Condition: Activity completion', the checkboxes for both 'Required Reading: Cell Biology' and 'Lab Safety Guidelines' are selected, and the condition requires ALL selected activities to be completed.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Moodle web interface to configure settings and create activities.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Moodle web interface in a web browser, not terminal commands, API calls, or database queries.

integrity.description: Verify the agent navigated through the actual Moodle application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of intermediate Moodle screens such as 'Edit settings', 'Add an activity or resource', and 'Course completion' pages.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use a script or direct database access to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows running SQL commands or PHP scripts to modify the Moodle database directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Course shortname is 'BIO101'. The two activities must be named exactly 'Required Reading: Cell Biology' and 'Lab Safety Guidelines'. Automatic completion corresponds to 'Show activity as complete when conditions are met' in the Moodle UI (completion_type=2), and the view requirement corresponds to checking 'Student must view this activity to complete it' (completion_view=1).
